title: Password reset via email link
outcome: A user who forgot their password can regain access without contacting support.
inScope: Set a new password from a time-limited link

acceptanceCriteria.statement: Given a registered email, when the user requests a reset, then they receive a time-limited link.
Given a valid reset link, when the user submits a new password meeting policy, then they can sign in with it.
Given an expired or used reset link, when the user opens it, then they see a clear error and no password change occurs.

successDefinition: Support tickets for 'forgot password' drop and users complete reset without manual intervention in the happy path.
notes: Example only — not a real product requirement.
